title: Content / writing / docs
summary: Articles & docs, not code. Spec is a brief + outline (tagged by Diátaxis type); implement is a 3-pass edit ladder; 'tests' become fact-check + style-lint; the human gate is an editorial review. No compile/schema.

stages.title: Brief + outline
stages.desc: Content brief + outline, tagged Diátaxis type (tutorial/how-to/reference/explanation).

stages.title: Structure audit
stages.desc: Cross-model audit of outline structure + coverage.

stages.title: Draft + edit ladder
stages.desc: Draft → developmental edit → line edit → copy edit.

stages.title: Style lint
stages.desc: Vale vs style guide + readability threshold.

stages.title: Watch engagement
stages.desc: Monitor engagement / corrections after publish (web content).
